name: Mirrabooka Investments Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.4600, stop A$2.3661, target A$2.7200 (2.77:1) — then trail it.
